gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用语音留言编织的跨时空浪漫，笑中带泪的意外之恋。
gems.whyWatchEn: A cross-distance romance woven through voicemail confessions, blending comedy and heartfelt emotion.
gems.audience: 喜欢非传统浪漫、细腻情感和意外幽默的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Audiences who enjoy unconventional romance, emotional depth, and witty humor.
